source:
state: world
state_count = 0
state_name = "world"
state_on = false

widgets:
  label: 1
  button: "up" { state_count += 1 }
  button: "down" { state_count -= 1 if state_count > 0 else 1 }

handler_statements:
  let state_count = 1;  ;  // state variable
  if state_count > 0 { state_count += 1 } else { state_count = 1 }  ;  // button "down"
  repeat state_count { state_count += 1 }  ;  // button "down" (only once)

expressions:
  "1", "2", "3", "42", true, "text"
  +, *, /, %, +, -, <, <=, >, >=, ==, !=, &&, ||, ( )

# Prooflite program for the app

state count = 0
state name = "world"
state on = false

widgets:
  label "1"
  button "text" { count = count + 1; count = count > 0 ? count - 1 : 1 }
  input string: name
  row: col
  if (count > 1) { widget: label "up"; button: text { count = count + 1 } }
  else if (count < 1) { widget: label "down"; button: text { count = count - 1 } }
  else { widget: label "count"}  # fallback if no button is pressed

# End of widgets

state "world"
state count = 0
state on = false

widgets:
  label "DARK MODE"
  button "dark" { let x = "dark"; if x then count += 1 else if x then count += 2 else count += 3; }
  button "light" { let x = "light"; if x then count = 0 else if x then count = 1 else if x then count = 2 else count = 3; }

handler:
  let x = "dark"
  if x then count += 1
  else if x then count += 2
  else if x then count += 3
  let x = "light"
  if x then count = 0
  else if x then count = 1
  else if x then count = 2
  else count = 3

end

state: "world"
state_count = 0
state_name = "world"
state_on = false

widgets:
  label "64"
  button "half" { let x = 64; if x > 0 { x = x / 2 } else { x = 0 } }

handler state: 64
if x > 0 { x = x / 2 }
repeat 1 { x = x / 2 }

end

(STATE state-name="world" state-count=0 state-on=false)
(WIDGETS
  (label "64")
  (button "text" { let x=64; x=x/2 })
)

# Prooflite program to create a small interactive app

state world
state count = 0
state on = false

widgets:
    label "64" -- display the initial value
    button "half" { let count = count / 2; let count = count / 2; } -- halves the value
    input name = "input" -- no input field

if "count" != 0 { widgets } else if "count" != 0 { widgets } else { widgets }

# End of widget tree

state count = 0; name = "count"; on = false;
widget label "count"; button "text" { let count = count + 25; if count >= 100 then label "complete"; } row { label "count" }, col { label "complete" } if count >= 100 else if count >= 25 else label "complete";

STATE
  state count = 0
  state name = "world"
  state on = false
END STATE

WIDGETS
  label "NAME: <typed text>"
  button "text" { let x = EXPR; x = "text" }
  input name
END WIDGETS

HANDLER STATEMENTS
  let x = EXPR
  if EXPR { label.text = "name" }
  let x = "text"
  if x == "text" { label.text = "name" }
  let x = 0
END HANDLER STATEMENTS

(state count 0; state name "world"; state on false)

(widgets
  (label "NAME: <typed text>")
  (input name "text" :label "Enter your name:" :type string :on state name)
  (row :col 1 :col 1)
  (if (expr "typed text") :row :col 1 :col 1)
)

(handler-state :count 0 :state name "world" :state on false)

```l
STATE (first, before any widget; the literal fixes the type â€” int, bool, string):
  state count = 0;   state name = "world";   state on = false;

WIDGETS (render top to bottom):
  label EXPR;                  -- one line of text (any type, displayed)
  button "text" { STMTS }      -- runs its handler when clicked
  input name;                  -- text field bound two-way to a STRING state
  row { WIDGETS }  col { WIDGETS }   -- horizontal / vertical grouping
  if EXPR { WIDGETS } else if EXPR { WIDGETS } else { WIDGETS }   -- conditional UI

HANDLER STATEMENTS (each ends with ;):
  let x = EXPR;      -- local variable       x = EXPR;   -- assign local or state
  if EXPR { ... } else if EXPR { ... } else { ... }
  repeat EXPR { ... }          -- the ONLY loop; count evaluated once, up front

EXPRESSIONS: 42, true, "text" (escapes \" \\ \n); state/local names;
  - !;

state count = 0;   state name = "world";   state on = false;

widget
  label "switch"
  button "text" { if on then on = false else on = true; }
  input name;          -- text field bound two-way to a STRING state
  row { widget } col { widget }
  if on then
    if on then
      label "mode A"
    else
      label "mode B"
  else
    label "mode A"
end

STATE
  state count = 0
  state name = "world"
  state on = false;

WIDGETS
  label "count"
  button "plus-four" { count += 4 if count < 10 }

HANDLER STATEMENTS
  let count = 4;  -- assign a local variable
  if count < 10 { count += 4 } else { count = 0 }

EXPRESSIONS:
  42, true, "count"

state world
  state count = 0
  state on = false

widget label "count"
  row [label "count", row [button "text" { let x = count; if x < 10 { x += 4 } else { } } ]]

widget label "add"
  row [label "add", row [button "text" { let x = count; if x < 10 { x += 4 } else { } } ]]

end widget

prooflite program: add

(START PROOFLITE)
(STATE NAME "count" ON FALSE)
(STATE COUNT 0)

(WIDGETS
  (LABEL "count" 10)
  (BUTTON "a+" { ADD 1 TO "count" })
  (BUTTON "b+" { ADD 1 TO "count" })
  (BUTTON "c+" { ADD 1 TO "count" })
  (INPUT NAME "sum" 10)
  (ROW "a+" "b+" "c+"")
  (IF EXPR { ROW "a+" } else if EXPR { ROW "b+" } else { ROW "c+" })
  (HANDLER STATEMENTS
    (LET X COUNT
      (IF EXPR { ADD 1 TO X })
      (IF EXPR { ADD 1 TO X })
      (IF EXPR { ADD 1 TO X })
    )
  )
)

(RESULT)
(sum count)

# Prooflite program for a small interactive app

state count = 0
state name = "world"
state on = false

widgets = [
    label("a+", count),
    button("a+", [let x = count; x += 1])
    label("b+", count),
    button("b+", [let x = count; x += 1])
    label("c+", count),
    button("c+", [let x = count; x += 1])
    label("sum", count)
]

# Display the sum widget
if "sum" in widgets:
    widgets.append(widget("sum", count))

(state count 0)
(wIDGETS
  (label "SUM")
  (button "a+" { let x = 1; count = x; })
  (button "b+" { let x = 1; count = x; })
  (button "c+" { let x = 1; count = x; })
  (row (if (expr count) (widget "SUM") (if expr count (widget "a+") (if expr count (widget "b+") (if expr count (widget "c+"))))

Here is a prooflite program that implements the described app:

```pro
STATE
  state count = 0
  state on = false
  state name = "world"
END STATE

WIDGETS
  label "a+"
  button "a+" { let x = 1; x = x + count; count = x; }
  label "b+"
  button "b+" { let x = 1; x = x + count; count = x; }
  label "c+"
  button "c+" { let x = 1; x = x + count; count = x; }
END WIDGETS

HANDLER STATEMENTS
  let x = 1; x = x + count; count = x; if EXPR { ... } else if EXPR { ... } else { ... }
END HANDLER STATEMENTS

EXPRESSIONS: 42, true, "text" (escapes \" \\ \n); state/local names;
  - !; * / %; + -; < <= > >=; == != (same type only); && || (short-circuit); ( )
  `+` with any string operand CONCATENATES ("n = " + count).

(state state "world" count 0 on false)

(widgets
  (label "type something")
  (input "text" { "text" } ; two-way text input
  (button "text" { "text" } ; runs its handler
  (if "text" { "text" } else { "text" } ; conditional UI
  (if "text" { "text" } else { "text" } ; conditional UI
  (if "text" { "text" } else { "text" } ; conditional UI
  (repeat "text" { "text" } ; loop
)

PROOFLITE
STATE
  state count = 0;   state name = "count";   state on = false;

WIDGETS
  label count_label;        -- text field
  button "step" { step }    -- button that replaces "count" with 2*count + 1

HANDLER STATEMENTS
  let x = count;   -- local variable
  if x > 0 { count = 2*x + 1 } else { count = 0 }

EXPRESSIONS
  42, true, "count" (escapes \" \\ \n); state/local names;
  !; * / %; + -; < <= > >=; == != (same type only); && || (short-circuit); ( . )

# Prooflite program
# Start with 0
state_count = 0
state_name = "world"
state_on = False

widgets = [
    {
        "label": "0",
        "button": "step",
        "state": "state_count",
        "on": True
    }
]

widget_tree = widgets

# Handler for "step" button
handler = {
    "let x = state_count;",
    "if state_on { state_count += 1 } else { state_count += 2 }",
    "repeat state_count { state_count += 1 }"
}

# Emit the prooflite program
emit_program(state_count, state_name, state_on, widgets, handler)

(state name "world" state on false)

(widgets
  (label "0")
  (button "text" { "step" })
  (input name "count" type "int")
  (row col 1)
  (if "count" { widgets } else { widgets }))

(handler-state statements
  (let x "count")
  (if "count" { (repeat x { x + 1 }) } else { (repeat x { x * 2 + 1 }) })
)

STATE
  state count = 0;   state name = "count";   state on = false;
WIDGETS
  label "count";      -- a label to show the number
  button "step" { let count = 2 * count + 1; }   -- button handler
HANDLER STATEMENTS
  let count = 2 * count + 1;  ;  // count updated when "step" is pressed
EXPRESSIONS
  42, true, "count" (escapes \" \\ \n); state/local names;
  - !; * / %; + -; < <= > >=; == != (same type only); && || (short-circuit); ( .

STATE: world
STATE COUNT: 0
STATE NAME: "world"
STATE ON: false

WIDGETS:
  label "20°"
  button "warmer" { let x = 20; x += 1; }
  button "cooler" { let x = 20; x -= 1; }

HANDLER STATEMENTS:
  let x = 20
  if x > 0 { ... } else { ... }
  if x > 0 { ... } else { ... }

EXPRESSIONS:
  20, true, "text", "warmer", "cooler", 1, 0, "warmer", "cooler"

# Prooflite program for the app

# Initialize state
state_count = 0
state_name = "world"
state_on = False

# Widgets
label = "Apples: <n>"
button_text = "add apple"
button_pears = "add pear"

# Tally start at 0
state_count = 0

# Widgets arranged vertically
widgets = [
    {
        "label": label,
        "button": {"text": button_text, "handler": lambda: state_count += 1}
    },
    {
        "label": "Pears: <m>",
        "button": {"text": button_pears, "handler": lambda: state_count += 2}
    }
]

# Display the widgets in a row
widgets = widgets + [widget for widget in widgets if widget != widgets[0]]

# No other code

(declare (state :state "world" :state-count 0))
(wIDGETS
  (label "unlock")
  (button "unlock" :on false)
  (input :name "text" :type string)
  (row :col 1 :col 1)
  (if :expr (row :col 1 :col 1) (if :expr (row :col 1 :col 1) (row :col 1 :col 1)))
  (statement :let x :expr (state :name "text" :type string) :expr "text")
  (statement :if (expr) :let x :expr (state :name "text" :type string) :expr (state-count + 3) :expr "OPEN")
  (statement :repeat :expr (state :name "text" :type string) :expr (state-count :expr 3))
)

(declare (type-state-state (state-name "world")))

(state-state
  (state-count 0
    (state-name "world"
    (state-on false)))
  (widget-text
    (label "Text")
    (widget-button "Clear" (widget-statement (widget-expr "state" :state "world" :name "text" :on "false"))))
)

(export-prooflite)
